name: Hoisin Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the marinade ingredients together.
2. Rub each chicken breast on both sides with the mixture.
3. Cover and marinate for 30 minutes at room temperature or for 1 hour in the refrigerator.
4. If refrigerated, bring the chicken to room temperature before grilling.
5. When the grill is hot or when the charcoal turns ash white, grill the chicken breasts on both sides, being careful not to overcook them.
